name: Microwave Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except walnuts in a large microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave on Medium until the chocolate chips are melted, stirring once or twice. This should take 3-5 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
4. Pour the mixture into a well-greased square baking dish that is 8x8 inches.
5. Refrigerate until the fudge has set.
6. Cut into squares and serve.
